summary: Full backend + frontend validation of HR Leave-Permissions feature (sick / hourly / travel) with manager→owner approval workflow. 7/7 backend tests pass and full UI flow works: 3 attendance-tab buttons, dialog with all fields, success toast, archive list with badge, approve flow with pending-count decrement.

minor.issue: Response omits annual_leave_balance — UI cannot display the employee's remaining balance and tests must read it from MongoDB directly. Consider including the field so the travel-leave dialog can warn before submission.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Include annual_leave_balance in GET /api/employees + GET /api/employees/{id} responses so the travel-leave dialog can show remaining days and the UI can pre-validate before sending the request.
critical_code_review_comments: payroll_routes.py is now ~1460 lines — leave-permissions endpoints append to an already large file. Consider extracting LeavePermissionCreate model + 5 endpoints into routes/leave_permissions_routes.py (mounted under same prefix) to keep files under ~700 lines per the code-review guideline.
Approve handler trusts that perm.days is correct without re-validating that date_to >= date_from on approval (it's validated at create). Acceptable since rows are immutable in pending state.
Bonus uses field name `bonus_type` (consistent with other bonuses) — fine; the review-request wording 'type permission' is informal.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_-prefixed leave_permissions documents (hourly, sick, travel) on employee 'موظف 1' (id c2420786-...). All approved or pending. No production data altered.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints under /api/leave-permissions are fully wired (create / list / pending-count / approve / reject) in /app/backend/routes/payroll_routes.py (lines ~1225-1459). UI on /hr → tab الحضور shows the 3 buttons; tab الأذونات والإجازات shows the archive + pending badge. Toast text on submit: 'تم الإرسال — بانتظار موافقة المالك'. After approve, sick → attendance docs with source=leave_approved; travel → employee.annual_leave_balance decreases; hourly → bonus document with bonus_type=permission. annual_leave_balance is not exposed via REST API — read from db.employees if you need to verify.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature works as specified; only a minor enhancement noted re: exposing annual_leave_balance in employee API response.
